steps.title: Find the multiplier
steps.content:
Each answer choice is proportional, so divide an output by its input. Using the first row,
$$\frac{4{,}536}{2{,}520}=1.8$$

steps.title: Confirm with another row
steps.content:
A second row gives the same multiplier.
$$\frac{6{,}804}{3{,}780}=1.8$$
So the function has the form
$$f(x)=1.8x$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the table points and the proportional model. The line $y=1.8x$ passes through the data points. The answer is B.
